summary: THREE_COLUMN: LEFT 14x14 weight mask for a single hidden neuron, fill_color GREEN/RED by sign and fill_opacity = |w|/max|w| — a blurred ring-detector kernel. CENTER a 14x14 input digit mask (ring) in WHITE. RIGHT the element-wise Hadamard product w⊙x, TransformFromCopy from input to product grid. Bottom summary MathTex shows z = Σ w_i x_i + b numerically and a = σ(z) in YELLOW.
